title: SentryConfiguration
description: This schema defines the Sentry Configuration for error tracking and performance monitoring.

enabled.description: Indicates whether Sentry error tracking is enabled.

backendDsn.description: Sentry Data Source Name (DSN) for the backend.

uiDsn.description: Sentry Data Source Name (DSN) for the UI.

environment.description: Environment label sent to Sentry (e.g., development, staging, production).

tracesSampleRate.description: Sample rate for performance traces (0.0 to 1.0).
